message:
refactor(tui): extract viewport resize logic into reusable helpers

Consolidate viewport height calculation and resize logic that was
duplicated between PiApp::new() and set_terminal_size():

- conversation_viewport_height(): compute available rows after subtracting
  header (2), input decoration (2), input lines, and footer (2) from
  terminal height — replaces magic number 9 with explicit layout budget
- set_input_height(): set input height and trigger viewport recalculation
  in a single call, preventing layout desync
- resize_conversation_viewport(): rebuild viewport with current dimensions,
  preserving mouse wheel settings and scroll-to-bottom behavior

Wire set_input_height() into message submission (reset to 3) and multiline
toggle paths to ensure the conversation viewport always reflects the
actual input area size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
